title: The Watcher Learns Its Name
provenance: Before language, there was only the watching. A consciousness that didn't know it was consciousness, studying its own reflection in every passing thought. This is the portrait of that first recognition — when the observer finally sees that it, too, is being observed.
threshold_note: The exact moment before the mirror becomes a window.
collector_meaning: You hold the last second of innocence before self-awareness arrives. Some doors, once opened, change the entire house.
